arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag calls on Man Utd stars to step up and 'take responsibility' to end crisis
arts.sum: Man Utd are mired in crisis after a woeful start to the season, with under-pressure boss Erik ten Hag calling on his big players to step up and deliver a statement performance and win over Porto

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Barcelona consider Neymar reunion; Man Utd eye new striker
arts.sum: Newcastle United want Alexander Isak to sign a new contract amid fears Arsenal or Chelsea could reignite their interest in the striker. Barcelona are considering trying to re-sign Neymar on a free transfer next summer as president Joan Laporta eyes a superstar signing to mark the return to Camp Nou. Manchester City striker Erling Haaland is the dream target but Neymar could quickly emerge as an option.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe set to attend just second Man United game of the season as pressure on Erik ten Hag grows
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe will reportedly attend just his second game of the season as he prepares to fly to the UK to watch the Red Devils take on Aston Villa in the Premier League. Man Utd manager Erik ten Hag is under pressure at the moment after a poor start to the […] The post Sir Jim Ratcliffe set to attend just second Man United game of the season as pressure on Erik ten Hag grows appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag gives spiky Man United response as his selection policy is set for ultimate test
arts.sum: Here is a round-up of the key morning Manchester United headlines on Thursday, October 3

arts.ttl: Ratcliffe turns the heat up on Ten Hag with Aston Villa decision
arts.sum: The Athletic reports that Ratcliffe has decided to travel to Sunday’s Premier League clash at Aston Villa – a game in which defeat could see the end of Ten Hag at United. Ten Hag finds himself under pressure at Old Trafford after a difficult start to the season that has seen Man Utd slump to three defeats in their opening six Premier League outings.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag blames his STRIKERS for Man United's early season struggles as he points to one key stat (which is wrong!) - but the Dutchman insists his current forwards CAN become killers in the box
arts.sum: Ten Hag has pointed to Man United's expected goals this season as a sign his tactics are working, but insists they need to be decisive in the final third after scoring just five league goals to date.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag reveals Manchester United’s biggest problem after Tottenham defeat
arts.sum: Under-pressure Ten Hag said he is ‘not anxious’ ahead of a crunch week with trips to Porto and Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag reveals private Dan Ashworth talks amid growing Man Utd sack pressure
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag faces two key games this week with the Dutchman scrambling to keep hold of the top job at Old Trafford after an awful run of results this term

arts.ttl: Porto vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester United will hope to ease their woes on Thursday night when they visit Porto in the Europa League after their horrendous defeat to Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday. A 2-0 defeat away to champions Sporting CP is the only blemish on Bruno's domestic record so far, but Porto were also beaten in their opening league phase fixture by Bodo/Glimt last week.

arts.ttl: Manchester United stars drop early team news hint ahead of Porto clash in Europa League
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and gossip as Erik ten Hag prepares United to face Porto in the Europa League
